hero.subtitle: Pioneering AI Research

aiForScience.name: AI for Science
aiForScience.description: Leveraging AI to accelerate scientific breakthroughs in environmental science and materials discovery. We develop deep learning models that can predict molecular properties, simulate chemical reactions, and optimize experimental designs.

environment.name: Environment
environment.description: Climate modeling, environmental monitoring, and sustainable AI solutions

material.name: Material
material.description: AI-driven materials discovery and property prediction

socialComputing.name: Social Computing
socialComputing.description: Investigating social dynamics through computational lens. We study social network structures, detect automated bots, and model social phenomena using large-scale data analysis.

socialBot.name: Social Bot Detection
socialBot.description: Identifying and analyzing social bots in online platforms

socialScience.name: Social Science
socialScience.description: Computational approaches to social phenomena and network analysis

generalAI.name: General AI
generalAI.description: Pushing the boundaries of general artificial intelligence through large language models, autonomous agents, and world models that can reason and plan.

llmPostTraining.name: LLM Post-Training
llmPostTraining.description: Fine-tuning, alignment, and reinforcement learning for LLMs

llmAgent.name: LLM Agent
llmAgent.description: Building autonomous agents powered by large language models

llmApplication.name: LLM Application
llmApplication.description: Practical applications and systems built on LLMs

worldModel.name: World Model
worldModel.description: Building internal representations of the world for AI systems

physicalAI.name: Physical AI
physicalAI.description: Integrating AI with physical systems to create intelligent robots and embodied agents that can perceive, reason, and act in the real world.

robotics.name: Robotics
robotics.description: Intelligent robotics, manipulation, and embodied AI

about.title: About Polaris Lab
about.subtitle: Located at Peking University
about.intro: Polaris Lab is an AI research laboratory dedicated to advancing the frontier of artificial intelligence. Founded with a vision to bridge theoretical breakthroughs and practical applications, we bring together researchers from diverse backgrounds to tackle grand challenges in AI.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To conduct world-class AI research that advances scientific discovery, benefits society, and shapes the future of intelligent systems.
